description:
Well, had this one, in a game...

For beginners - According to the japanese rules set(The default rules set on this site), "territory" owned by a group in seki, isn't counted.

(Notes: Includes a couple of questions. The anwsers to any -
 of which, are availible when using the "Navigate Solution"
 option, under "Show Solution".)

Thanks to jvdoubov, atak and unkx80 for their comments.

Does this 1) kill('K') the white marked group. 2) Is either captured or creates a seki('S' depending on the amount of 'ko' threats. 3) is a wasted move, and white should tenuki('T'). ?FORCE]GM[1]FF[4]CA[UTF-8]AP[CGoban:2]ST[2]RU[Japanese]KM[0.00]PW[White]PB[Black]PL[W]

(;W[dr];B[cq]C[Black lives])
(;W[as]C[Black could even pass, and play around, a bit... (Pass/ Tenuki)];B[bs]C[Black lives..])
(;W[ar];B[as]C[Hmm..]))
(;W[ko];B[pq]C[Black kills.])
